label: Insert
description: Inserts value as a sibling of the node matched by xpath (prepends before it by default; order=Append inserts after it).

xpath.label: XPath
xpath.description: Target node the value is inserted next to.

value.label: Value
value.description: XML content to insert as a sibling of the matched node.

order.label: Order
order.description: Prepend (default) before or Append after the matched node.
